name: soliton
description: Intelligent multi-agent PR review with adaptive risk-based dispatch

skills.name: pr-review
skills.description: Run an intelligent, risk-adaptive PR review with parallel multi-agent analysis

agents.name: risk-scorer
agents.description: Fast risk assessment of PR changes. Computes a 0-100 risk score from 6 weighted factors and recommends which review agents to dispatch.

agents.name: correctness
agents.description: Detects logic errors, off-by-one bugs, null handling issues, and race conditions

agents.name: security
agents.description: Detects security vulnerabilities following OWASP Top 10 with data flow analysis

agents.name: hallucination
agents.description: Detects AI-generated code issues — non-existent APIs, wrong signatures, deprecated dependencies

agents.name: test-quality
agents.description: Evaluates test coverage and test quality for changed code

agents.name: consistency
agents.description: Checks changed code against project conventions and coding style

agents.name: cross-file-impact
agents.description: Detects when changes break callers, interfaces, or type contracts in other files

agents.name: historical-context
agents.description: Uses git history to identify high-risk patterns in changed files

agents.name: synthesizer
agents.description: Merges, deduplicates, filters, and synthesizes findings from all review agents into a coherent review
